title: BLUE VerifierPlus Privacy Policy
intro1: BLUE VerifierPlus is an open source digital credential verification and public sharing website originally developed by the <dccLink>Digital Credentials Consortium</dccLink> and evolved for <blueLink>BLUE</blueLink>, the academic trust network operated by <redirisLink>RedIRIS</redirisLink> (Red.es) in collaboration with <crueLink>CRUE Universidades Españolas</crueLink>.
intro2: This Privacy Policy explains how BLUE VerifierPlus collects, uses, and processes personal information about its users.
collect1: BLUE VerifierPlus only collects the information you voluntarily provide. BLUE VerifierPlus has no control over what personal information may be included in the digital credential used with the service. Categories of personal information that may be included and collected during the verification process include the following: Name, Email Address, Credential Data.
collect2: Additionally, to provide you with access to BLUE VerifierPlus, we collect your IP address.
howCollect1: We collect information, including personal information, when you use BLUE VerifierPlus.
howCollect2: We collect information, including personal information, when you choose to create a Public Link that shares credential data from the BLUE Learner Credential Wallet to BLUE VerifierPlus.
howCollect3: We may log the IP address, operating system, page visit behavior, and browser software used by each user of the Site, and we may be able to determine from an IP address a user's Internet Service Provider and the geographic location of their point of connectivity.
useTitle: How We Use Your Personal Information
use1: We collect, use and process your personal information (1) to process transactions requested by you; (2) to facilitate the legitimate interests of the BLUE project and its operators; and/or (3) with your explicit consent, where applicable.
shareTitle: When We Share Your Personal Information
share1: We will share information we collect (personal information) with third parties providing services on behalf of BLUE VerifierPlus, including MongoDB. You can review MongoDB's <mongoLink>privacy policy</mongoLink>.
storageTitle: How Your Personal Information is Stored and Secured
storage1: BLUE VerifierPlus is designed to protect personal information in its possession or control. This is done through a variety of privacy and security policies, processes, and procedures, including administrative, physical, and technical safeguards that reasonably and appropriately protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the personal information that it receives, maintains, or transmits. Nonetheless, no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure, and therefore we do not guarantee its absolute security.
retentionTitle: How Long We Keep Your Personal Information
retention1: We will maintain a record of all personal information collected to enable your use of the Site for a period of thirty (30) days. Once created, all Public Links are set to expire after a period of one (1) year. Before this automatic deletion, you can unshare your Public Link from the credential used to create it in your BLUE Learner Credential Wallet, or you may send a request to delete your Public Link or personal information to <emailLink>blue@rediris.es</emailLink> and provide a copy of the Public Link itself. However, please be advised that if you submit a request to delete your Public Link, it cannot be reset.
additional1: We may change this Privacy Policy from time to time. If we make any significant changes in the way we treat your personal information we will make this clear on our website or by contacting you directly.
additional2: The controller for your personal information is the BLUE project at RedIRIS (Red.es). We can be contacted at <emailLink>blue@rediris.es</emailLink>.
